title: Separate shared runtime env from developer test env on staging

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing explicit runtime/dev environment separation: retain py311 for deployed services, add py311-dev bootstrap script for local test work on shared staging instances, and document standard usage.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Added scripts/setup_py311_dev_env.sh to clone runtime py311 into isolated py311-dev and install Poetry/dev dependencies there. Updated README development section with explicit runtime-vs-dev env guidance and pytest command for py311-dev. Committed and pushed: 63f8886d.
